comment: Synthetic Stage IV cutaneous melanoma, 48M, ECOG 0, BRAF V600E confirmed by tissue NGS. Low-volume disease (oligometastatic lung), normal LDH, no CNS involvement, no visceral crisis. Per DREAMseq sequencing data, 1L IO-doublet preferred over BRAFi+MEKi for BRAF V600+ patients without symptomatic / rapidly-progressive disease. Engine routes ALGO-MELANOMA-METASTATIC-1L step 0 (KIT absent) → step 1 (RF-MELANOMA-BRAF-V600-ACTIONABLE fires) → step 2 (RF-MELANOMA-TRANSFORMATION-PROGRESSION absent — symptomatic_cns_metastases=false) → IND-MELANOMA-METASTATIC-1L-NIVO-IPI (CheckMate-067 7.5y OS 49%). Standard plan-track. BRAFi+MEKi held in reserve for 2L per DREAMseq (post-IO ALGO-MELANOMA-METASTATIC-2L step 3).
